title: pilosella brachiata
intro: Pilosella brachiata, also known as Mouse-Ear Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pilosella brachiata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for various herbal preparations, such as infusions for treating colds and flu or topical applications for skin issues.
